---
title: "AI Cyber Security Design"
description: "Animated architecture diagrams across AI infrastructure, AI security, data platforms, and how modern AI systems really work — end to end."
page-layout: full
toc: true
toc-location: left
toc-title: "Series"
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
        .acsd-grid {
          display: grid;
          grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(420px, 1fr));
          gap: 1.5rem;
          margin: 1.5rem 0 2.5rem;
        }
        .acsd-card {
          border: 1px solid rgba(76,74,152,0.18);
          border-radius: 12px;
          overflow: hidden;
          background: var(--bs-body-bg);
          transition: transform .15s ease, box-shadow .15s ease;
        }
        .acsd-card:hover {
          transform: translateY(-3px);
          box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(76,74,152,0.18);
        }
        .acsd-card img {
          width: 100%;
          display: block;
          background: #fff;
          border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(76,74,152,0.12);
        }
        .acsd-card .acsd-body { padding: .85rem 1rem 1.1rem; }
        .acsd-card .acsd-title { font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; margin: 0 0 .25rem; }
        .acsd-card .acsd-desc { font-size: .85rem; color: #6c6c80; margin: 0; line-height: 1.4; }
        .acsd-intro { max-width: 60rem; }
      </style>
---

::: {.acsd-intro}
A growing collection of **animated architecture diagrams** — each one a single, detailed picture of how a real AI or security system fits together, from raw input to final output. Built for sharing on LinkedIn, and collected here.

Click any diagram to view it full-size.
:::

## 🏗️ AI Infrastructure

::: {.acsd-grid}

::: {.acsd-card}
![Agentic RAG Platform](ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/01-agentic-rag-platform.gif)
::: {.acsd-body}
::: {.acsd-title}
Agentic RAG Platform
:::
::: {.acsd-desc}
Beyond retrieve-and-answer — an agent that plans, searches, calls tools, and grounds its answer.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.acsd-card}
![LLM Fine-tuning Pipeline](ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/02-llm-finetuning-pipeline.gif)
::: {.acsd-body}
::: {.acsd-title}
LLM Fine-tuning Pipeline
:::
::: {.acsd-desc}
Data → instruction pairs → LoRA/QLoRA training → evaluation → registry → ship.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.acsd-card}
![AI Evals & Observability](ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/03-ai-evals-observability.gif)
::: {.acsd-body}
::: {.acsd-title}
AI Evals & Observability
:::
::: {.acsd-desc}
Log every prompt, score quality/safety/cost, trace the why, and catch drift before users do.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.acsd-card}
![Multi-Agent Orchestration](ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/04-multi-agent-orchestration.gif)
::: {.acsd-body}
::: {.acsd-title}
Multi-Agent Orchestration
:::
::: {.acsd-desc}
A supervisor routes work to specialist agents over a shared bus — coordination, not just a model.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.acsd-card}
![Voice AI Pipeline](ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/05-voice-ai-pipeline.gif)
::: {.acsd-body}
::: {.acsd-title}
Voice AI Pipeline
:::
::: {.acsd-desc}
Speech → text → LLM → speech, streamed back in under a second to feel like a real conversation.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.acsd-card}
![MLOps CI/CD for Models](ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/13-mlops-cicd.gif)
::: {.acsd-body}
::: {.acsd-title}
MLOps CI/CD for Models
:::
::: {.acsd-desc}
git push → tests + eval gates → registry → canary → monitor → auto-promote or auto-rollback.
:::
:::
:::

:::

## 🛡️ AI Security

::: {.acsd-grid}

::: {.acsd-card}
![Securing the LLM App Stack](ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/06-securing-llm-stack.gif)
::: {.acsd-body}
::: {.acsd-title}
Securing the LLM App Stack
:::
::: {.acsd-desc}
The OWASP Top 10 for LLMs, mapped to every layer an attacker can reach — input to output.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.acsd-card}
![AI Red Teaming Platform](ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/07-ai-red-teaming-platform.gif)
::: {.acsd-body}
::: {.acsd-title}
AI Red Teaming Platform
:::
::: {.acsd-desc}
Generate adversarial prompts at scale, hunt jailbreaks and leaks, feed findings back to guardrails.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.acsd-card}
![AI-Powered SOC](ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/08-ai-soc-platform.gif)
::: {.acsd-body}
::: {.acsd-title}
AI-Powered SOC
:::
::: {.acsd-desc}
ML triage + an AI agent that enriches and correlates, mapping threats to MITRE ATT&CK.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.acsd-card}
![Shadow AI / Data-Leak Prevention](ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/09-shadow-ai-dlp.gif)
::: {.acsd-body}
::: {.acsd-title}
Shadow AI / DLP
:::
::: {.acsd-desc}
Discover unsanctioned AI tools, inspect what data leaves, and redact secrets before they go.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.acsd-card}
![Zero Trust for AI Agents](ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/10-zero-trust-ai-agents.gif)
::: {.acsd-body}
::: {.acsd-title}
Zero Trust for AI Agents
:::
::: {.acsd-desc}
Identity (SPIFFE), policy on every action (OPA), short-lived secrets (Vault), least privilege.
:::
:::
:::

:::

## 🪣 Data Platforms

::: {.acsd-grid}

::: {.acsd-card}
![Modern Data Platform for AI](ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/11-modern-data-platform.gif)
::: {.acsd-body}
::: {.acsd-title}
Modern Data Platform for AI
:::
::: {.acsd-desc}
Ingest → lake/warehouse → transform → govern → serve to both analytics and AI.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.acsd-card}
![Realtime ML / Fraud Detection](ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/12-realtime-ml-fraud.gif)
::: {.acsd-body}
::: {.acsd-title}
Realtime ML / Fraud Detection
:::
::: {.acsd-desc}
Stream → feature store → score in milliseconds → approve/block/review → retrain on new patterns.
:::
:::
:::

:::

## 🔍 AI Explained Visually

::: {.acsd-grid}

::: {.acsd-card}
![What Happens When You Ask ChatGPT](ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/14-chatgpt-request-journey.gif)
::: {.acsd-body}
::: {.acsd-title}
What Happens When You Ask ChatGPT
:::
::: {.acsd-desc}
Edge → gateway → moderation → router → GPU prefill/decode → tokens streamed back, with latencies.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.acsd-card}
![Inside a Frontier Training Run](ai-cyber-security-design/gifs/15-frontier-training-run.gif)
::: {.acsd-body}
::: {.acsd-title}
Inside a Frontier Training Run
:::
::: {.acsd-desc}
Web-scale data → clean/dedup/tokenize → distributed pretraining → eval gates → post-training → release.
:::
:::
:::

:::

---

*Made by Kader Mohideen — AI × CyberSecurity. Follow along on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/kader-m-1a6023a6/).*
